Now Live: Switch Position Modes Without Closing Trades
Wed, 06 May 2026 16:00:00 GMT
https://www.bitmex.com/blog/switch-mode-now-live
You can now change between hedge mode and one-way mode on any supported contract without closing your open positions. No slippage, No Fees. Switch Mode is available on Web, Mobile, and via the BitMEX API. For full details on the new feature and how to get started, read our FAQs . In the meantime, if you have any questions please contact Support .
